Disassembly & Assembly Service

Furniture Disassembly & Assembly for Safe, Stress-Free Moving

We disassemble, protect, move, and rebuild large furniture properly — so your move does not end with missing screws, loose frames, or unstable pieces.

Built for apartments, houses, offices, storage deliveries, and complex furniture moves across Westchester County, NYC, New Jersey, and Connecticut.

Request a Full Setup Quote Call Now
Complex furniture handled right
No lost screws or hardware
Reassembled exactly as before
The problemMost furniture damage happens when items are forced through tight spaces or rebuilt the wrong way.
The solutionWe reduce size, protect parts, track hardware, and rebuild everything with structure.
The resultYou walk into a home or office where the important pieces are already set up correctly.

Most furniture does not fail during the drive. It fails during breakdown and setup.

That is why assembly support is not a small extra. It is the difference between a move that feels finished and a move that leaves the customer dealing with tools, parts, and problems.

!
Loose frames after reassemblyBeds, desks, and sectionals can feel unstable when rebuilt without control.
!
Missing screws and mixed hardwareSmall parts must stay organized with the right furniture piece.
!
Cracked panels and stripped boltsWrong tools, rushing, or forcing pieces can damage expensive furniture.
!
Large pieces stuck in tight spacesDisassembly helps protect walls, elevators, staircases, and furniture structure.

What the customer gets

This page is built around outcomes: less damage, less stress, better organization, and a move that feels complete.

01
No DamageYour furniture stays structurally safer before loading, during transport, and after delivery.
02
No Missing PartsScrews, brackets, bolts, and hardware are grouped, protected, and tracked.
03
No GuessworkFurniture is rebuilt with proper tools and placed where it belongs.
04
No StressYou do not need to fight with tools, instructions, or unstable furniture after move day.

We make the move feel finished.

A customer does not want a pile of bed parts, loose screws, and an unfinished room after delivery. They want the bed rebuilt, the sectional connected, the desk stable, and the space ready to use.

Atlantic Star handles disassembly and assembly as part of the moving plan — not as an afterthought.

Add Setup to My Move
Apartment movesIdeal for beds, sectionals, wardrobes, elevators, stairs, and narrow hallways.
House movesBest for bedroom sets, living room furniture, gym equipment, and multiple rooms.
Office movesDesks, tables, shelving, conference furniture, and workstation setup.
Storage deliveriesFurniture can be taken apart for storage and rebuilt after final delivery.

Add this to your move

Most clients combine assembly support with protection, packing, and full-service moving so the job is handled start to finish.

Popular

Packing + Assembly

We pack, disassemble, move, and rebuild furniture so the customer avoids move-day chaos.

Recommended

Furniture Protection

Frames, panels, corners, and hardware are protected before they enter the truck.

Full Service

Move + Setup

Delivery, placement, reassembly, and final room setup support for a smoother finish.

Choose the right level of service

Not every move needs the same level of assembly support. We match the scope to the furniture, building, and destination setup.

Simple

Disassembly Only

Best when large items need to be broken down for safer transport.

  • Beds and tables
  • Basic frames
  • Tight doorways or stairs
Best Value

Disassembly + Reassembly

The most common option for a complete moving experience.

  • Breakdown before loading
  • Hardware control
  • Rebuild at destination
Premium

Full Setup Support

For homes, offices, storage deliveries, and complex furniture systems.

  • Multiple rooms
  • Office furniture
  • Large or complex pieces

Our process

Simple, controlled, and organized from the first screw to the final setup.

Step 1

Identify

We review which pieces need disassembly and confirm any special concerns.

Step 2

Break Down

Furniture is taken apart carefully with the right tools and proper handling.

Step 3

Protect & Track

Pieces and hardware are organized, protected, and moved with control.

Step 4

Rebuild

Items are reassembled at the new location and placed where they belong.

Want a faster quote? Send photos.

Photos help us understand the furniture type, size, hardware, and access points before the crew arrives.

Show the full furniture piece Show tight hallways, stairs, or elevator areas Show labels, model numbers, or hardware if available

Furniture and equipment we handle

Professional furniture disassembly and assembly for residential moves, commercial moves, storage deliveries, packing support, and relocation coordination.

Bedroom Furniture

Bed frames, headboards, dressers, wardrobes, nightstands, platform beds, and storage beds.

Living Room Furniture

Sectionals, sofas, entertainment centers, shelving, tables, and large multi-piece furniture.

Office Furniture

Desks, conference tables, cubicles, filing systems, shelving, and commercial workstations.

Gym Equipment

Treadmills, racks, benches, weight systems, and large fitness equipment that needs safer handling.

IKEA & Modular Furniture

Flat-pack, modular, and complex furniture systems that require organized reassembly.

Storage & Delivery Setup

Furniture rebuilt after storage, delivery, apartment moves, house moves, or office relocation.

Furniture Disassembly & Assembly in Westchester County, NYC, New Jersey & Connecticut

Atlantic Star Relocations helps customers move large, heavy, fragile, and complex furniture without the stress of taking it apart or putting it back together. Our team handles furniture disassembly before the move, protects frames and hardware during transport, and completes furniture reassembly at the destination.

Residential Furniture

Beds, dressers, sectionals, dining tables, wardrobes, shelving, and other household furniture prepared for safe moving and reassembly.

Commercial & Office Furniture

Desks, conference tables, cubicles, office stations, storage units, and workspace furniture handled with structure and control.

Heavy & Complex Items

Gym equipment, large furniture pieces, tight-space items, and complicated assemblies managed with proper tools and planning.

Request your disassembly / assembly quote

Tell us what furniture needs to be taken apart or rebuilt. Photos are helpful for accurate planning.

What to include:

Item list, photos, pickup and delivery addresses, stairs/elevator details, and whether assembly is needed at destination.

Disassembly & Assembly FAQs

Clear answers for customers planning a move with furniture setup.

Do movers disassemble furniture?

Yes. Atlantic Star Relocations can disassemble furniture before loading and reassemble it after delivery.

Can you reassemble beds after the move?

Yes. Bed frames, headboards, platform beds, storage beds, and standard bedroom furniture can be rebuilt at destination.

Do you bring tools?

Yes. The crew brings professional tools for common furniture disassembly and assembly needs.

Can you handle IKEA furniture?

Yes. IKEA and modular furniture can be handled, depending on the item condition and complexity.

Is assembly included in the moving price?

It depends on the scope. We confirm assembly needs upfront so the right time and crew are planned.

Can you disassemble furniture for storage?

Yes. Disassembly can make furniture safer and more efficient for storage, loading, and delivery.

Do you handle office furniture assembly?

Yes. We support desks, tables, shelving, conference furniture, and basic workstation setup.

What should I send for an accurate quote?

Send photos, dimensions if available, pickup and delivery details, stairs/elevator information, and a list of items.
